content.rationale: The cedent's liquidity contingency plan indicates prudent risk management, but the exposure to a Taiwan Strait closure scenario is material. The 1-in-50 year OEP of $240M and 1-in-100 year OEP of $330M suggest significant tail risk. Setting retention at $50M covers frequent losses while ceding tail risk. Premium is set at 20% of the AEP ($16M) to reflect the moderate loss ratio of 68% and provide adequate margin for the cat exposure.
